title: You
subtitle: A quiet kind of timing.
clearLocationHint: Clear — your recent locations are still available
debugMode.title: Debug mode on
toast.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Long-press the value to select.
resetDeviceId.title: Reset device ID?
resetDeviceId.body: This clears your rate-limit counter on the Worker and treats you as a new device. Useful for development testing.
clearMoments.title: Clear all saved moments?
clearMoments.body: This removes everything from Your Moments tab. Cannot be undone.
